name: 马球会休息室
description: 宽敞的休息室，设软榻数张，铺绸缎靠垫。墙边摆药箱和茶几，茶几上放药碗。室内悬灯笼，夜晚灯火通明。窗帘半掩，透出夜色。地面铺地毯，角落设屏风隔出私密空间。家具为浅色木料，整体温暖舒适。
visual_reference: Ming Dynasty guest rest room at night, soft couches with silk cushions, medicine chest and tea table with medicine bowl, hanging lanterns providing warm lighting, half-drawn curtains showing night outside, carpeted floor, privacy screen in corner, light wood furniture, comfortable warm interior, intimate healing space
lighting: 灯笼散发的暖黄光线，营造温暖氛围，窗外夜色深沉
emotional_range: 陆姝仪示弱跪求→沈词护短→高令宁冷眼旁观
